## 📋 Title

Provide a clear and descriptive title for your pull request.

**Format**: `feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `add:`, `update:`

**Example**: `feat: add OSPF configuration lab for Lab 8`

---

## 🔗 Linked Issue

Fixes #<issue-number>

<!-- If this PR addresses an issue, please link it above -->

---

## 📝 Summary of Changes

Provide a clear and concise description of what this pull request does.

**Changes:**
- Added ...
- Modified ...
- Fixed ...
- Removed ...

---

## 🎯 Type of Change

Please check the relevant option(s):

- [ ] ✨ **feat**: A new lab or feature
- [ ] 🐛 **fix**: A bug fix in existing lab
- [ ] 📚 **docs**: Documentation only changes
- [ ] 🔧 **update**: Update existing lab configuration
- [ ] 🧪 **test**: Testing or validation changes
- [ ] 🎨 **refactor**: Restructuring labs (no functional changes)

---

## 🧪 How Has This Been Tested?

Describe how you tested your changes:

**Test Environment:**
- OS: [e.g., Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Packet Tracer Version: [e.g., 8.2.0]
- Devices Used: [e.g., Router 2911, Switch 2960]

**Test Steps:**
1. Open the .pkt file in Packet Tracer
2. Verify device configurations
3. Test connectivity
4. Validate protocols

**Test Results:**
- ✅ All tests passed
- ⚠️ Some tests (describe which ones)

## ✅ Checklist

Please check all that apply:

### Lab Quality
- [ ] ✅ Lab opens correctly in Packet Tracer
- [ ] 🔧 All devices are properly configured
- [ ] 🌐 Network connectivity is functional
- [ ] 📝 Naming conventions are followed
- [ ] 🔒 No sensitive information included (real IPs, passwords)

### Testing
- [ ] 🧪 Tested in Packet Tracer
- [ ] 🔄 Verified all configurations work
- [ ] 📊 Tested edge cases (if applicable)
- [ ] 💻 Tested on multiple platforms (if possible)

### Documentation
- [ ] 📚 Lab file follows naming convention
- [ ] 💬 Configurations include comments
- [ ] 📖 README updated (if adding new lab category)

### Security
- [ ] 🔐 No real IP addresses from production
- [ ] 🔑 No real passwords or credentials
- [ ] 📝 Using documentation IP ranges (RFC 5737)
- [ ] 🎓 Generic hostnames and descriptions
